/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/chimera_real.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chimera_real.dir/src/BinanceRestClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chimera_real.dir/src/BinanceDepthWS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chimera_real.dir/src/BinanceUserDataWS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chimera_real.dir/src/BinanceAggTradeWS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chimera_real.dir/src/FadeETH.cpp.o -o chimera_real  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lwebsockets -lpthread
